This is a Rust project. Generate idiomatic, efficient, and safe Rust code. Use best practices for error handling and documentation.

Refer to the Mesh-Sieve documentation for API references: /references/Mesh-Sieve_API_Guide.md

Refer to the Mesh-Geometry documentation for geometry functions: https://docs.rs/mesh-geometry/latest/mesh_geometry/

Refer to the Kryst documentation for iterative and direct linear solvers and preconditioners: https://docs.rs/kryst/latest/kryst/

The basic premise of the project is to implement a modular flexible, unstructured finite volume coastal ocean model.
The theoretical background is based on the works:
/references/Fringer2006.pdf
/references/Chen2003.pdf
/references/Casulli2022.pdf
/references/Lee2020.pdf
/references/Casuilli2000.pdf
